data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"16:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nAll on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.\\nDo not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.\\nRole: inline.\\nImage grammar: example_comparison.\\nPurpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..\\nDiagram type: comparison_board.\\nConcept summary: 很多模型发布，热度都死在标题里。这次不太一样。2026 年 3 月 19 日，`@latentspacepod` 转发的 AINews 用一句很硬的概括把重点钉住了：**MiniMax 2.7，追平 GLM-5，同级成本只要三分之一**。.\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks, two-column contrast with one takeaway strip, evidence markers aligned by criterion.\\nKey relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.\\nLayout pattern: comparison_matrix.\\nDiagram focus: before/after evidence contrast.\\nText position: integrated.\\nText budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.\\nHeadline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.\\nSubheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.\\nLabel budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.\\nLabel count budget: <= 6 labels.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"这不是又一条“国产模型…\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"一个具体例子就够了\\\".\\nGrammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.\\nAdditional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这不是又一条“国产模型上新”的热闹消息。Latent… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis..\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\\nDo not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.\",\"resolution\":\"1K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
